caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview. He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I DON'T NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a green cap, along with headphones. The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating an animated discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session.
